# Remote Official Product + Pricing Pages (2026)

## Summary
Authoritative Remote.com pricing and product surface as of May 2026. Confirms the 100%-owned-entity model (no partner network), publishes full tiered pricing including annual discount, and introduces Remote MCP — a 2026 product allowing AI agents to connect to live payroll, contracts, compliance, and org-structure data without API keys or exports. Also covers Contractor of Record with uncapped indemnity vs Contractor Management Plus with $100K indemnity cap.

## Key quotations / statistics
- **EOR pricing:**
  - $599/employee/month (annual billing — 14% discount)
  - $699/employee/month (monthly billing)
- **Other product pricing:**
  - Recruit: Starting at $199/month (AI talent sourcing, cancel anytime)
  - Global Payroll: $29/employee/month (for companies with own entities)
  - Contractor Management: $29/contractor/month (only pay for active contractors)
  - Contractor Management Plus: $99/contractor/month (+ $100K indemnity coverage per contractor)
  - Contractor of Record (COR): From $325/contractor/month (uncapped indemnity; Remote as legal entity)
  - US PEO: From $99/employee/month
  - Equity: From $39/month (Delaware C-Corps)
  - HR Management: Free (up to 12 direct employees)
- **No deposits or accruals required** (rare exceptions for high-risk markets)
- **No platform, onboarding, or setup fees** for EOR, HR Management, Contractor Management
- Global Payroll DOES have an implementation fee (for entity setup) and recurring payroll delivery fee
- **"Fair Price Guarantee"** on Contractor Management — only pay for active contractors
- **Billing currencies:** 12 currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, NZD, SGD, CHF, SEK, NOK, DKK, JPY)
- **Coverage:** 90+ countries with fully owned legal entities (no partner network)
- **Compliance:** SOC 2 Type 2, ISO 27001 certified
- **2025-2026 announcements:**
  - **Remote MCP** — new product allowing AI agents to connect to live payroll/contracts/compliance/org data; no API keys or exports needed; positions Remote as AI-agent-ready infrastructure
  - **Recruit** product launched with AI talent sourcing from 800M+ profiles
  - **Contractor of Record** expanded with uncapped indemnity (vs $100K cap in Contractor Management Plus)
  - **Equity product** added for global equity grant administration
  - **Annual billing discount** introduced (14% off EOR, $699 → $599/month)
  - **Native integrations:** Workday, HiBob, BambooHR, Personio
- Voted "#1 global HR platform" on G2

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- **The earlier comparison source claim "Remote requires 1 month of gross salary deposit per employee" is now CONTRADICTED by Remote's official statement that "no deposits or accruals required (rare exceptions for high-risk)."** Stinger-forge should resolve this contradiction by treating the deposit requirement as situational (high-risk markets only) rather than universal — and verify with Remote during procurement
- The $599 (annual) vs $699 (monthly) split means stinger-forge should always quote the annual-billing price as the headline, with monthly billing as a 14% premium option
- **Remote MCP is a meaningful 2026 differentiator** for AI-native teams — surface in `guides/03-international-eor.md` as a forward-looking selection factor for companies building AI-agent workflows that need live HR/payroll data
- Remote Equity at $39/month is the cheapest equity admin product in the comparison set and a direct competitor to Carta for Delaware C-Corps — but unlikely to displace Carta for series-A+ companies due to Carta's deeper 409A and IPO toolkit
- Contractor Management Plus at $99/contractor with $100K indemnity is a useful intermediate product between standard Contractor Management ($29) and COR ($325) — surface in `guides/02-classification-matrix.md` as the "I want some misclassification protection without full COR" option
- Note: Remote.com publishes 90+ countries via owned entities, narrower than Deel's 150+ or Oyster's 180+; this country gap is meaningful for emerging-market hiring
